name: BoaConsulta
description: Developer of an online medical appointment platform designed to assist patients to connect with the health experts. The company's platform offers to read reviews and schedule appointments anytime and from anywhere, enabling patients to find a health practitioner nearby and lead a healthy life.

name: Carreira Beauty
description: Operator of an online B2B marketplace platform intended to cater services to beauty professionals and salons in Brazil. The company's platform provides services like career development and digital presence, enabling companies in the sector of beauty and well-being to find opportunities and gain more knowledge.

name: DVPJ
description: Developer of an online business management platform designed to manage the financials, stocks, and contacts of a company. The company's platform helps micro and small businesses in financial management, sales management, inventory management, invoicing, and billing, enabling entrepreneurs to focus on expanding their businesses and maximizing their profits.

name: Cuponomia
description: Operator of an online marketplace intended to discover and share coupon codes. The company's platform gathers coupons that can be used during online shopping, helps to save money and gains benefits every time one makes a purchase over the Internet, enabling shoppers to avail desired discounts and cashbacks on their favorite products.

name: Descomplica
description: Operator of an e-learning platform intended to prepare for college entrance exams. The company's platform offers free access to pre-recorded classes, live classes, online monitoring as well as online lessons for subjects like mathematics, physics, and chemistry to help people achieve their goals through affordable and quality education, enabling students to learn at their own pace as well as prepare and clear other entrance exams at low cost.

name: GreenQ
description: Developer of a waste management technology designed to offer connected garbage collection for municipalities. The company's technology uses a hardware-enabled garbage waste tracking device that is installed on all garbage trucks which collects real-time data on the waste pickup process, without any need for manual activation, enabling garbage collection vendors, system integrators, and municipalities to weigh incoming waste and predict the garbage production rate as well as reduce expenses and emissions while also providing improved services to their citizens.

name: Ingresse
description: Developer of a web and mobile-based ticket booking application designed for users to buy tickets for events in local areas. The company's application provides reviews, commentary, celebrity interviews, and trailers and offers users the ability to buy tickets in advance, enabling customers to decide and choose tickets for events and plays that suit their interests.

name: Já Entendi
description: Provider of educational services intended to cater to the needs of blue-collar workers. The company's services include online professional training and capacity building the company through video classes with an exclusive methodology for workers at the base of the pyramid that helps to leverage blue-collar workers transforming content like books, booklets and manuals into video lessons, enabling workers with skilled knowledge in various fields to work efficiently.

name: Linte
description: Developer of cloud-based legal software designed to provide document management. The company's software offers to create, manage, and automate documents and legal contracts, enabling legal professionals to gain total control over a contract life cycle.

name: Mediacao Online
description: Developer of an online mediation platform intended to assist in solving extrajudicial legal conflicts. The company's platform allows its users to resolve disputes between two or more parties by being connected to legal counsels and assists them in drawing up an agreement with an automated, binding mediation process, enabling Brazilian corporations and consumers to resolve legal disputes quickly and inexpensively without having to rely on third-party legal contractors, making the process fast and effective.

name: Nazar
description: Developer of a cloud-based application designed to help in database performance monitoring. The company's cloud-based application specializes in agentless database performance monitoring to keep applications running fast and reduce infrastructure costs, enabling businesses to perform database analysis and quality monitoring for all tasks.

name: Olist
description: Operator of an online e-commerce site aggregation intended to facilitate direct sales on sites. The company's platform connects entrepreneurs with major online retailers and allows them to advertise and sell in the marketplaces without complication, enabling retail companies to reach out to the international marketplaces, improve the shopping experience and modify their purchasing behavior.

name: Pipefy
description: Developer of a workflow management tool designed to create custom processes and workflows for organizations. The company's platform allows team members to plot out standard, replicable operating procedures that permit to streamlining of multistep processes, enabling businesses to organize, manage and automate all processes in a single platform with multiple features in an efficient manner.

name: Quero Educação
description: Developer of an education platform designed to connect students with educational institutions. The company offers a marketplace for finding scholarships and courses, a digital enrollment platform, a payment processing system, marketing and recruitment tools, data analytics and financial services, enabling students to find and enroll in higher education.

name: QueroQuitar
description: Developer of a debt negotiation platform designed to help users with the online negotiation process. The company's platform provides privacy, independence, and security in operations carried out by debtors, facilitating access to the solution of their debts, without intermediaries, and also provides information and tips on how to improve the financial planning of families, helping debtors and individuals to handle their debt online on a single platform.

name: Nova Lima
description: Developer of team management software designed to increase the productivity of employees while working as a team. The company's software offers a work collaboration interface that assists managers in organizing and managing their tasks, time, costs, workflow, and talent, enabling clients to increase profitability and reduce operational costs.

name: Send4 Tecnologia
description: Developer of a reverse logistics platform intended to simplify the process of exchange and returns for both customers and brands. The company's platform connects consumers to brands through interfaces in an omnichannel concept, increasing logistics and service efficiency and eliminating customer experience gaps in the process of exchanging and returning purchases, enabling retailers to offer a seamless post-purchase experience to their customers.

name: Trocafone
description: Operator of an online smartphone marketplace intended to help customers to buy and sell used phones and smartphones online. The company's marketplace improves the selling and buying experience by acquiring the devices from sellers, refurbishing and re-selling them as pre-owned certified, enabling buyers to enjoy various deals for peer-to-peer transactions combined with the service, convenience and safety of a retail store.

name: Edools
description: Operator of an online learning platform. The company delivers an online platform that takes care of management videos and documents, students management, e-commerce integration, scalability, customization of appearance and provides an API for integration with third party services.

name: SambaAds
description: Provider of a video distribution network platform intended to recommend videos for publishers and websites. The company's video distribution network platform includes media buyers access to video views on local (Brazilian) premium publishers in the form of standard and interactive formats, enabling users to produce videos and inke to any type of content produced.
